scripts.check:brain-bridge: cd bridge && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.bdd:validate: bun run bdd:test:tools && bun run bdd:lint:features && bun tools/bdd-validate.ts
scripts.bdd:gate: bun run bdd:test:tools && bun run bdd:lint:features && bun tools/bdd-gate.ts
scripts.bdd:gate:live: bun --env-file=.env.live.local run bdd:test:tools && bun --env-file=.env.live.local run bdd:lint:features && BDD_GATE_PROFILE=live bun --env-file=.env.live.local tools/bdd-gate.ts
scripts.bdd:gate:orchestrator: bun run bdd:test:tools && bun run bdd:lint:features && BDD_GATE_CATEGORY=orchestrator bun tools/bdd-gate.ts
scripts.bdd:gate:runtime-loop: bun run bdd:test:tools && bun run bdd:lint:features && BDD_GATE_CATEGORY=runtime-loop bun tools/bdd-gate.ts
scripts.bdd:gate:cdp: bun run bdd:test:tools && bun run bdd:lint:features && BDD_GATE_CATEGORY=cdp bun tools/bdd-gate.ts
scripts.bdd:gate:llm: bun run bdd:test:tools && bun run bdd:lint:features && BDD_GATE_CATEGORY=llm bun tools/bdd-gate.ts
scripts.bdd:gate:session: bun run bdd:test:tools && bun run bdd:lint:features && BDD_GATE_CATEGORY=session bun tools/bdd-gate.ts
scripts.bdd:gate:panel: bun run bdd:test:tools && bun run bdd:lint:features && BDD_GATE_CATEGORY=panel bun tools/bdd-gate.ts
